series_metadata.series_title: Motor Vehicle Fleet Inspection Decal Record. (HP-2D)
series_metadata.series_description: Entry is made each time inspection decals are issued to a motor vehicle fleet Inspection Station. Record of inspection decals in numerical sequence to be recorded each time inspection decals are issued, The inspection decal number is an identifying number appearing directly below the word "Ohio" on the inspection decal.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: inspection decal expires, two years
